summary: Iteration 101: All 7 features tested and verified working - App Badge notifications endpoint, Dashboard Pillar Popup component, Compact Dining Concierge Picker with 6 service cards, Unified Product Box with Concierge/Bundle filters, Sync Stay and Seed All Pillars buttons, Stay Sync endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 features verified: 1) /api/notifications/unread-count returns count with breakdown (push_notifications, ticket_updates, pending_requests), 2) PillarPopup component exists in MemberDashboard.jsx (lines 598-750) with stats grid and recent activity, 3) DiningConciergePicker shows 6 compact service cards (Chef's Table, Private Home Dining, Pet Party Catering, Restaurant Reservations, Meal Subscriptions, Group Dining Events), 4) Clicking service card opens form modal with City/Date/Time/Guests fields, 5) Unified Product Box has Concierge® and Bundle in product type dropdown, 6) Sync Stay and Seed All Pillars buttons visible in Product Box filters, 7) POST /api/admin/stay/sync-to-products endpoint working

app_badge_notifications.details: Returns unread_count with breakdown of push_notifications, ticket_updates, pending_requests. Requires member authentication.

dashboard_pillar_popup.details: Component shows pillar stats grid and recent activity. Clicking pillar icon opens modal with Explore button.

compact_dining_concierge_picker.details: Shows 6 compact service cards: Chef's Table, Private Home Dining, Pet Party Catering, Restaurant Reservations, Meal Subscriptions, Group Dining Events

dining_concierge_modal.details: Clicking service card opens form modal with City, Date, Time, Number of Guests, Special Requests fields and Submit Request button

unified_product_box_filters.details: Product type dropdown includes: Physical Product, Service, Experience, Reward Product, Concierge®, Bundle

sync_buttons.details: Both 'Sync Stay' and 'Seed All Pillars' buttons visible in filter row

stay_sync_endpoint.details: Endpoint syncs stay_properties to products collection. Returns synced count.

api_tests_passed: GET /api/notifications/unread-count - Returns count with breakdown (requires auth)
POST /api/admin/stay/sync-to-products - Syncs stay properties to products
GET /api/product-box/products - Returns products list with total
ui_tests_passed: Dine page loads with compact dining concierge picker
6 dining service cards displayed with icons and descriptions
Clicking Chef's Table card opens form modal
Form modal has City, Date, Time, Guests, Special Requests fields
Admin login works and redirects to dashboard
Product Box tab accessible in admin panel
Product type dropdown shows Concierge® and Bundle options
Sync Stay and Seed All Pillars buttons visible
